# PaginationUtilities.IsLastPage method

Returns `true` when this is the final page — `nextCursor` is absent (`null`). Mirrors TS `isLastPage`. (R-12.2-d, R-12.3-c)

```csharp
public static bool IsLastPage(string? nextCursor)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| nextCursor | The result's `nextCursor`, or `null`. |

## Return Value

`true` when the cursor is absent.
